steps.title: Track Daniel's actions
steps.content: Daniel keeps the petition with him at all times, watches for tribal members who have not signed, and gets signatures in many places and situations. The details emphasize his persistent effort.

steps.title: Reject community-focused readings
steps.content: A invents refusal based on dislike. B claims attitudes change over time, which the passage does not show. C shifts focus to tribal members' enthusiasm, but the passage centers on Daniel's commitment. The answer is D.
